data.title: SIA names Roth Staffing Companies as Grand Prize Winner of the 2026 Best Staffing Firms to Work For
data.description: In Orange, California, on March 27, 2026, the 2026 Best Staffing Firms to Work For list was unveiled by Staffing Industry Analysts at the Executive Forum North America event in Austin, Texas. Roth Staffing Companies clinched the Grand Prize in a specific category.

data.title: Leadership expert John C. Maxwell keynotes groundbreaking of Austin Christian University's $50 million Bringmann Center
data.description: A top NVIDIA official, Roger Bringmann, emphasizes the significant impact of Austin Christian University on molding future business leaders, entrepreneurs, and innovators. Based in Georgetown, Texas, this news was announced on March 27, 2026. The renowned leadership expert and bestselling author, Dr. John, was also mentioned in this context.

data.title: Gradient Toxicologist Lindsey Borton Receives Society of Toxicology Award
data.description: Toxicologist Lindsey Borton of Gradient was honored with the Best Published Paper Award by the Medical Device and Combination Product Specialty Section of the Society of Toxicology. This recognition was announced in Boston on March 27, 2026. Lindsey Borton, serving as Principal Toxicologist at Gradient, has been acknowledged for her outstanding contribution to toxicology research.

data.title: Jack Nicklaus has Joined Forces with TWG Global to Acquire the Businesses Nicklaus Founded
data.description: A recent acquisition has been completed by 20 Majors, LLC, an investment group headed by Jack Nicklaus, TWG Global, and Nicklaus Brown. The group has successfully acquired the businesses of Nicklaus Companies, LLC, a prominent golf experience company established by Mr. Nicklaus over 50 years ago. This acquisition marks a reunion between Mr. Nicklaus and the iconic images and marks representing his illustrious career, particularly the Golden Bear. Additionally, the acquisition has incorporated Mr. Nicklaus' ongoing design projects into Nicklaus Design, the company where these projects will now be conducted.

data.title: Allot Files Annual Report on Form 20-F for the Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: On March 27, 2026, in Hod Hasharon, Israel, Allot, a prominent global provider of Security-as-a-Service (SECaaS) and Deep Network Intelligence solutions for communication service providers and enterprises, disclosed the submission of its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission ("SEC"). Allot is listed on NASDAQ (NASDAQ: ALLT) and TASE (TASE: ALLT).

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Slumps 400 Points On U.S.-Iran War News; Sandisk Jumps, Finds Support (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following President Trump's decision to extend the negotiation deadline with Iran. This led to a drop of 400 points in the stock market. Additionally, oil prices saw an increase due to the uncertainty surrounding the situation. Sandisk, however, showed positive performance by jumping and finding support amidst the market fluctuations.

data.title: OneBullEx Launches AI-Native Futures Infrastructure Platform, Integrating Quantitative Research Tools and Systematic Execution Architecture for the Crypto Derivatives Market
data.description: In Hong Kong on March 27, 2026, a significant development is underway in the world of cryptocurrency trading. Platforms like OneBullEx are leading the way by integrating AI-powered research and validation tools directly into exchange systems. This innovation is shaping a novel technical framework for crypto trading, marking a transformative shift in the industry.
